meta.title: Anastasia Vojkic · Application Developer
meta.description: Application developer focused on robust systems, clean architecture and thoughtful interfaces.

about_text.intro_strong1: Bachelor's degree in Application Design and Development
about_text.intro_regular2: and plan to continue my studies by joining a
about_text.intro_strong2: Master's program in Computer Science & Mobility
about_text.intro_regular3: through a work-study program. I am currently looking for a company to join for the upcoming academic year.
about_text.part1: What I enjoy most in this field is starting from point A, imagining point B, then building everything in between while anticipating constraints and potential obstacles.
about_text.part2: A simple idea can grow into a rich system when it is approached with rigor, high standards, and attention to detail.
about_text.part3: I appreciate well-structured systems and interfaces that make sense. Curious about every layer of a project, I have a particular interest in the back end, where security, consistency, and data reliability come into play. The interface then highlights this work, as it is the part the end user sees first.
about_text.part4: I favor solutions that are robust, scalable, and maintainable, even if that requires more thought and work upfront.

fun_quotes: Code that works today and tomorrow.
Simple when possible, solid when necessary.
